_comment: This is the settings file for the Claude Desktop Filesystem Extension.
_comment_location: Actual file lives at: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/Claude Extensions Settings/ant.dir.ant.anthropic.filesystem.json
_comment_warning: Usually you edit this via Claude Desktop's Settings UI, not by hand. Only edit directly if the UI can't do what you need.
_comment_backup: Before editing this file by hand, back it up: cp '/path/to/file' ~/Desktop/filesystem-ext-settings.backup.json
